text:
>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>> Original Message <<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<
 
 On 10/25/00, 3:02:37 PM, epep0002@acebo.pntic.mec.es wrote regarding
 misc/22290: mi ordenador al cabo de un tiempo no arranca:

 > Despues de un tiempo de perfecto funcionamiento no arranca y pita pero=
 
 > despues de un tiempo de espera funciona bien la fuente de alimentaci=F3=
 n
 funciona
 
 
 <guess at an interpretation>
 
 Your machine stops working properly after performing well/correctly
 for some  time; however, after a while, your power supply starts
 correctly functioning again -- since somebody has had a look at your
 power supply and at your fan.
 
 </guess at an intepretation>
 
 
 > perfectamente y el ventilador tambi=E9n porque ya me lo han mirado,
 > gracias de antemano por su inter=E9s.
 > Un saludo.
 
 
 
 Eduardo,
 
 This is an **English-speaking** forum; as far as your competence in
 English is concerned, this forum is very "fault-tolerant" :-))
 
 Could you please post in English (even rudimentary English: it doesn't
 matter) in future, and provide as many relevant details as you can ?
 
 As to your specific problem, you haven't provided enough information.
 It seems to be hardware-related, but I can't say any more. Please
 check your hardware (RAM, cache, fan, etc.) carefully before writing
 such a PR (=3DProblem Report): PRs relate to software bugs.
 
 Best regards & best of luck,
 Salvo (Italian :-)
